<!-- generated: 2026-05-29 / uoink v3.1 -->
# Uoink

> Uoink is a local-first Chrome extension plus desktop helper that extracts a structured corpus from videos and podcasts, then hands that corpus to Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, or a local MCP agent through clipboard, direct send, or 13 MCP tools.

## Install

- [Install Uoink](https://uoink.video/install): Windows helper, browser extension, macOS status.
- [How it works](https://uoink.video/how): click -> corpus -> AI workflow.

## Product

- [Features](https://uoink.video/features): capture, memory, search, hooks, comments, entities, privacy.
- [Podcasts](https://uoink.video/podcasts): RSS feeds, local Whisper transcription, speaker diarization.
- [Privacy](https://uoink.video/privacy): no account, no Uoink cloud, no telemetry.

## Agents and MCP

- [Agents](https://uoink.video/agents): Claude Desktop, Cursor, Cline, Continue, ChatGPT Desktop setup.
- [MCP](https://uoink.video/mcp): server metadata, tool names, transport notes.
- [MCP manifest JSON](https://uoink.video/mcp/manifest.json): machine-readable server manifest.

## Trust

- [About + public downloads](https://uoink.video/about): total GitHub release downloads and no user tracking note.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ryanbiddy/uoink): source, releases, MIT license.
- [Changelog](https://uoink.video/changelog): shipped and in-flight work.
- [Terms](https://uoink.video/terms): short legal notes.
